coverage_note: The bundled FCER1G population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from FCER1G IgE receptor biology, mast-cell and eosinophil activation, cytokine and chemokine signaling, NF-kappaB control, and JAK-STAT inflammatory regulation and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000158869: FCER1G coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: FCER1G findings should be read against IgE receptor biology, mast-cell and eosinophil activation, cytokine and chemokine signaling, NF-kappaB control, and JAK-STAT inflammatory regulation; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

FCER1G immune-response variation model is curated as a FCER1G marker for Allergy, asthma, atopy, and inflammatory disease context, Mast-cell, eosinophil, cytokine, and chemokine pathway biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

FCER1G regulatory expression context model is curated as a FCER1G marker for Allergy, asthma, atopy, and inflammatory disease context, Mast-cell, eosinophil, cytokine, and chemokine pathway biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
